title: JunoClaw — Verifiable AI Agents with TEE-Attested Junoswap Revival on Juno
summary: JunoClaw is an open-source agentic AI platform built natively on Juno Network. This signaling proposal asks the community to recognize JunoClaw as Juno ecosystem infrastructure and endorse the deployment of its contracts on mainnet as an experiment. Full details: https://hackmd.io/s/HyZu6qv5Zl
